description: GMass turns Gmail into a cold email and mail-merge platform, sending personalized campaigns from Google Sheets with automated follow-ups and tracking.
tagline: Mail merge and mass email for Gmail
overview: GMass runs personalized cold email and mail-merge campaigns directly inside Gmail, pulling from Google Sheets with automated follow-ups, tracking, and higher sending limits.
what_is: GMass is a cold email and mail-merge tool built into Gmail. It turns the Gmail compose window into a campaign sender, personalizing messages from Google Sheets and handling the sending limits that normally cap outreach from a regular inbox.

It is handy for newsletters, cold email campaigns, and personalized announcements, with automated follow-ups and list building. Because it lives in Gmail, there is little to learn and campaigns can go out almost immediately after setup.
GMass fits the stack as a Gmail and Google Sheets sending extension rather than a CRM or enrichment tool. It is best used purely for mass and personalized emailing inside Gmail.
